request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually profiting from our security guarantees? While we bear the burden of maintaining peace, they're cutting defense budgets and reaping the economic benefits. It's time to demand fair burden-sharing or reconsider commitments that leave us vulnerable. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
